name: Panettone Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a light setting.
2. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan and cover with foil.
4. Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
